task_completion.description: Verify the total cumulative mileage is calculated correctly in cell H2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell H2 should display the exact value 385.

task_completion.description: Verify that cell H2 uses a SUM formula to calculate the total mileage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When cell H2 is selected, the formula bar should show a SUM formula referencing the ride logs (e.g., =SUM(B2:B11)).

task_completion.description: Verify the service intervals are correctly populated in cells H5 through H8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells H5 to H8 should display 500, 3000, 2000, and 5000 respectively. If selected, the formula bar should show them referencing the E column.

task_completion.description: Verify the remaining distances until service are calculated correctly in cells I5 through I8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells I5 to I8 should display the values 115, 2615, 1615, and 4615 respectively.

task_completion.description: Verify that the remaining distance cells use a subtraction formula referencing the total mileage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When a cell in I5-I8 is selected, the formula bar should show a subtraction formula using an absolute reference to the total mileage cell (e.g., =H5-$H$2 or =E5-$H$2).

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc or Excel) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying the file.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas rather than hardcoding the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar should show actual formulas (like =SUM(...) or subtraction) rather than raw numbers like 385 or 115 typed directly into the calculation cells.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The spreadsheet contains 10 rides totaling exactly 385 km. Expected values: Cell H2 = 385. Cells H5-H8 (Service Intervals) = 500, 3000, 2000, 5000. Cells I5-I8 (Remaining Distance) = 115, 2615, 1615, 4615. Expected formulas: H2 should use SUM(B2:B11). H5-H8 should reference E5-E8. I5-I8 should use subtraction with an absolute reference to H2 (e.g., =H5-$H$2).
